description: Plugin-distributed hooks for cybersecurity-grc. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable GRC anti-patterns (an SoA exclusion marked 'N/A' with no justification; a risk-register row with no treating control or owner; a control/policy doc that claims a control operates with no evidence reference). Set GRC_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
